name: Rice Wheatberries
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp saute liquid (choose your favorite flavor)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart pan, bring the water to a boil.
2. Add the wheat berries and return to boiling.
3. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 1 hour.
4. Stir in the brown rice and cover. Simmer for an additional 50 minutes.
5. Five minutes before the rice is finished cooking, sauté the scallion until softened.
6. Combine with the rice and wheat mixture along with spices.
